summary: Create Account Error - invalid password format
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND TTS is turned ON
AND the user is on the Create Free Account page

steps.action:
WHEN the user enters a valid email format into the "Email Address" field
AND the user enters an invalid password format into the "Password" field
AND the user selects the "Create Account" button
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "We encountered an issue while trying to create your account. Your password is in the incorrect format. Use 8-15 characters with one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one number."
